tasks.title: Implement Glossa SDK (@glossa/sdk)
tasks.description: Framework-agnostic HTTP fetch + cache + SSE subscription. Client(config) factory; client.bundle(locale) with etag/304; client.subscribe(); in-memory cache invalidated on SSE; client.scan() for CLI. Pluggable transport. Acceptance: vitest happy path + 304 + reconnect + miss; <5kb gzipped (native fetch); works in Node + browser.

tasks.title: Deployment (k3s on edge-1)
tasks.description: Mirror IRI/Brotwerk k3s patterns. Distroless API Dockerfile, nginx admin Dockerfile, GHA release.yml building both images on tag push + k3s rollout. Postgres StatefulSet (20Gi PVC). Ingress + cert-manager TLS. Daily backup CronJob via rclone + Hetzner Storage Box. Acceptance: git tag v0.1.0 → both images ship + roll; admin reachable over HTTPS; Postgres survives pod restart; backup target receives daily dump.

tasks.title: Implement Lit web components (@glossa/elements)
tasks.description: <glossa-provider>, <glossa-text>, <glossa-rich>, <glossa-plural>, <glossa-select>. ReactiveController exposes context; SSE updates flow into a Lit signal. Slot content is fallback. Strict mode logs missing keys. A11y: rendered text inherits parent semantics. Acceptance: demo page mounts every component, locale toggle swaps every string; component tests via vitest+jsdom; <10kb gzipped.

tasks.title: Implement CLI (@glossa/cli)
tasks.description: glossa init / scan / pull / push. Honours .gitignore (nox-style). Deterministic JSON output for meaningful diffs. Exit codes 0/1/2/3. Acceptance: fixture-project tested; npx works without global install; pull output stable across runs.

tasks.title: First consumer migration (IRI or Brotwerk)
tasks.description: Validate the whole stack against a real consumer. Pick the calmer project. Add <glossa-provider> to root layout. Replace 5-10 representative strings. Run glossa scan from consumer CI to seed keys. Wire fallback so consumer build still works when Glossa is offline. Acceptance: edit in admin → consumer updates within 5s without redeploy; consumer build works when Glossa is killed; one translator updates a key end-to-end without engineer involvement.

tasks.title: Implement ICU subset (@glossa/format)
tasks.description: Own ICU MessageFormat subset, ~200 LOC + ~150 LOC tests. Lands first — nothing else depends on it. Scope: variable interpolation, plural via Intl.PluralRules, select, nesting, apostrophe escaping. Defer numbers/dates/relative-time/list to Intl.* built-ins. Acceptance: vitest covering ICU edge cases, <3kb gzipped, zero runtime deps, exports format() + parse().

tasks.title: Implement Admin UI (apps/admin)
tasks.description: Lit + Vite translator interface. Dogfoods @glossa/elements + @glossa/sdk. Login (JWT), project switcher, key list with status filters, edit form with ICU live preview, bulk JSON import/export, diff view, project mgmt, per-user locale scoping. Acceptance: translator can sign in → edit → save → SSE event lands in demo consumer; keyboard-only flow works; <250kb gzipped.

tasks.title: Implement SSE live-update channel
tasks.description: GET /api/v1/projects/:slug/sse. Event envelope per docs/design.md §5.2. In-process fanout for MVP; Redis pubsub when multi-replica. Client-side reconnect with exponential backoff in SDK. Heartbeat every 30s. Per-tenant rate limit. Acceptance: edit-in-admin → SSE event within 1s; survives 60s idle; reconnect recovers via Last-Event-ID.

tasks.title: Implement Go API + Postgres schema (apps/api)
tasks.description: REST + SSE service. Hex-arch mirror of IRI's apps/api. Scope: golang-migrate migrations per docs/design.md §6, sqlc repos, domain layer (Project/Locale/Key/Translation/Tenant), use cases (CreateProject, UpsertKeys, UpdateTranslation, ListBundle, RotateAPIKey), REST endpoints per §5.1, JWT + API-key auth, RLS policies for tenant isolation, /healthz + /readyz. Acceptance: go test ./... clean, RLS integration test, OpenAPI spec.
